candidate_definition_hints.text: AWS Guard Rules Registry is an open-source repository of [AWS CloudFormation Guard](https://github.com/aws-cloudformation/cloudformation-guard) rule files and managed rule sets that help organizations *shift left* in their Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) processes.
